title: rubus orthopus
intro: Rubus orthopus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a type of flowering plant in the rose family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and skin conditions, due to its ability to soothe and protect the body. Rubus orthopus can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile treatment option for various health concerns.
